note: Media pro start-list articles (triathlon.de, tri-mag.de, …). The robot (scripts/ingest-pro-starts-media.mjs) fetches each, matches the article text against our athlete roster (no LLM, full-name match → no false positives), and adds CONFIRMED upcoming starts. These are often EARLIER than the official PTO list (e.g. IRONMAN/Challenge). ADD A SOURCE = one entry: url + event + date (race date, ISO) + optional series/location/confidence (default confirmed).
